messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao on-premises. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## IP Restrictions

### Network Sources

```bash
oci iam network-source create \
  --compartment-id $TENANCY_ID \
  --name office \
  --cidr-block-list '["203.0.113.0/24"]'
```

### Policy

```bash
Allow group corp to manage all-resources in tenancy \
  where request.networkSource.name = 'office'
```

### Riscos
- IP spoofing
